arts.ttl: Done Deal: Patrick Dorgu to Join Manchester United
arts.sum: Patrick Dorgu, the Danish winger from Lecce, is on the verge of becoming a Manchester United player in a deal that will shatter Lecce's transfer record. As his parents pack boxes for the move, Dorgu anxiously awaits the final confirmation on his phone, ready to embark on his new journey with the Red Devils.
